summary: Pack 4 - Finance + Vendor Scheduling & Assignment testing completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed 3 frontend issues: (1) PaymentsQueuePage.jsx import path for DetailDrawer, (2) VendorOrderDrawer.jsx import path for VendorEtaInput, (3) SalesOrderDrawerV2.jsx React hooks called conditionally. Frontend verified: Payment queue status tabs work, approved payments visible with green badges, drawer shows customer/payer/financial/approval history sections.
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentsQueuePage.jsx: Fixed import path from '../../components/ui/DetailDrawer' to '../../components/admin/shared/DetailDrawer'
VendorOrderDrawer.jsx: Fixed import path from './VendorEtaInput' to '../vendor/VendorEtaInput'
SalesOrderDrawerV2.jsx: Fixed React hooks violation - useState was called after early return, moved hooks before conditional return
live_commerce_service.py finance_queue correctly accepts status_filter parameter and returns enriched payment data
admin_facade_routes.py payments/{id} correctly returns customer_contact and approval_history
sales_delivery_override_routes.py correctly implements internal-buffer and dates endpoints
vendor_assignment_engine.py correctly implements find_best_vendor and get_vendor_candidates
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing payment proofs and invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 4 Finance + Vendor Scheduling complete. Payment queue now supports status filtering (all/uploaded/approved/rejected). Payment drawer shows enriched data: customer name, payer name, contact phone, company name, payment reference, approval history. Vendor ETA endpoint at POST /api/vendor/orders/{id}/eta. Internal buffer endpoints at /api/sales/delivery/{id}/internal-buffer and /api/sales/delivery/{id}/dates. Vendor assignment suggestion at /api/admin/vendor-assignment/suggest. All frontend import issues fixed. Demo vendor has 0 orders so VendorEtaInput component couldn't be tested with real data but component exists and is properly imported.

features_tested.vendor_eta_endpoint: PASS - Endpoint exists and validates input

frontend_payments_queue.approved_badges: PASS - 45 approved payments with green badges
frontend_payments_queue.drawer_content: PASS - Customer, Payer, Financial, Invoice Link, Approval History sections

frontend_customer_invoices.paid_status: PASS - Shows 'Paid in Full' and 'Approved Payment' badges
